While it effectively builds capacity for Bosniak mosques, there is limited external data to measure the direct social outcomes of these investments [1].

strengths.detail: The organization directs <cite id="1">97.6% of its total expenses</cite> toward its programs, significantly exceeding the <cite id="4">peer program ratio median of 85.3%</cite>.
The charity maintains <cite id="1">9.2 months of working capital</cite>, providing a robust buffer to sustain operations during economic fluctuations.
The organization reports <cite id="1">$0.00 spent to raise every $1</cite>, maximizing the impact of every dollar contributed by the community.

strengths_deep_dive: The organization's financial health is a primary strength, characterized by a <cite id="2">program expense ratio of 97.9%</cite> which indicates that administrative overhead is kept to an absolute minimum. This efficiency is paired with a <cite id="3">42.2% revenue growth rate</cite> over the last three years, suggesting strong community trust and successful scaling of its fundraising efforts. Additionally, the organization maintains a <cite id="1">100% independent board</cite>, which supports objective oversight of its <cite id="2">$3,387,088 in total assets</cite>.
rich_narrative.summary: Islamska Zajednica Bosnjaka Sjeverne Amerike (IZBSA) serves as a central financial and administrative pillar for Bosniak Islamic centers across the United States and Canada. The organization operates with a primary mission of <cite id="1">fundraising for charitable purposes and key initiatives</cite> that sustain religious and cultural preservation for the Bosniak diaspora. In the 2023 fiscal year, the charity reported <cite id="2">total revenue of $4,520,145</cite>, representing a significant <cite id="3">3-year revenue CAGR of 42.2%</cite>. This growth underscores its expanding role in supporting North American mosques and community centers. The organization is characterized by an extremely lean financial model, maintaining a <cite id="1">program expense ratio of 97.9%</cite>, ensuring that nearly all contributions directly fund its core religious and community services. Furthermore, the charity demonstrates exceptional fiscal discipline with <cite id="1">fundraising efficiency of $0.00 per $1 raised</cite>, meaning it does not spend donor funds on professional fundraising solicitations.
